one_line_verdict: A bold, intimate Shakespeare adaptation powered by Riz Ahmed's raw performance — essential viewing for theater and drama lovers, but better saved for streaming if spectacle is your priority.
english_note: Shakespearean verse dialogue, dense poetic language, and British accents demand close attention throughout.
credits_detail: No credits scene — the film ends on a stark, definitive note consistent with the tragic source material. (Speculative based on genre conventions.)
one_line_summary: Riz Ahmed burns through Shakespeare's greatest tragedy in this raw, modern-edged Hamlet.
